114:1-3.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ · مَلِكِ النَّاسِ · إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ
114:1-3.english: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the King of mankind, the God of mankind.
114:1-3.score_notes: Surah An-Nas — recited every day in salah and before sleep. Could revisit in a surah-based lesson.
